title: A Resolution approving the Supplemental Investment Program (SIP) for Supplemental Appropriation for the Year 2025 amounting to Two Million pesos (Php 2,000,000.00) chargeable against government equity surplus and Seven Million Seven Hundred Fifty-One Thousand Four Hundred Forty-Five pesos and 08/100 (Php 7,751,445.68) chargeable against the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Current Appropriation - 30% Quick Response Fund.
